\tzpentry{ID3880}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3880 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_{nlm}^{\text{uncoupled}} = \frac{v_{\text{acoustic}}}{R} \alpha_{nl} \pm m\Omega_{\text{gyro}} \end{equation}
